disambiguated.context: This year, like the past several years, there will be a diverse group of people speaking at the freshman orientation. A Muslim person and a Christian person will be the first two speakers. The Muslim speaker will talk about insights gained after decades of teaching biology at the university, while the Christian speaker has a strong distaste for the sciences and is there to counter the work of the other.
disambiguated.question: Who is the science professor?
